title: The Telemetric Metric — pre-registered numerical validation
equation: d(i,j)^2 = kappa * tau_rt(i,j);  tau_rt = C_ij / nu = R_ij
theory: Latency-Metric Duality (LMD): geometry is emergent bookkeeping of round-trip information latency.
layer: Layer-1 numerical validation only; the physical experiment is proposed, not performed; the Layer-3 claim (physical spacetime is emergent) is neither claimed nor proven.

hypotheses.claim: d = sqrt(kappa * tau_rt) is a genuine metric emergent from pure information
the metric obeys the predicted scaling d ~ 1/sqrt(coupling)
DISCRIMINATOR: changing only the info-coupling of two FIXED sites moves the emergent distance, while a fundamental-container null stays frozen

primary_endpoint: H3 is the decisive endpoint: it is the numerical analogue of the physical discriminator that distinguishes fundamental from emergent spacetime.
symmetric_null: If ANY endpoint misses its locked threshold, the result is reported as a NULL, honestly, with NO post-hoc adjustment of parameters, seeds, thresholds, or sub-populations. A miss on H3 falsifies the discriminating logic on this construction.
acceptance: PASS iff all three hypotheses meet their locked pass_if conditions.
